name: April O'shea's Authentic Italian Meatballs (Xv
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 1/3 ground beef, 1/3 pork and 1/3 veal (or all beef) in a large bowl.
2. Add minced garlic, Italian seasoning blend, parsley, breadcrumbs, onion, egg, salt, and Parmesan cheese.
3. Form the mixture into meatballs and fry them in a large skillet with about 1/2 cup olive oil over medium-high heat until browned on all sides and cooked through (about 15-20 minutes).
4. Alternatively, place the meatballs on a baking or broiler rack and cook for less grease but drier results.
5. Add the finished meatballs to your sauce and simmer gently for about 1 hour before serving.
